Journal.Title: International journal of cardiology. Congenital heart disease
Journal.ISOAbbreviation: Int J Cardiol Congenit Heart Dis

Article.ArticleTitle: Strength and resistance training in adult congenital heart disease: A guide to exercise prescription in the clinic.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Golden Jubilee National Hospital, Agamennon Street, Clydebank, G81 4DY, United Kingdom.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: The authors declare that they have no known competing financial interests or personal relationships that could have appeared to influence the work reported in this paper.
